title: 14 Precious Metals
body_text:
14	Precious Metals
14.1	Overview of Precious Metals
This Part describes the processes associated with purchasing and buying back precious metals.
You can offer customers the opportunity to invest in precious metals. This offering is available through a partnership between Central 1 and Royal Bank of Canada (RBC). For all precious metals inquiries or sales, Central 1 acts as the intermediary between financial institutions and Royal Bank. Precious metals purchases or sell-back sales are included in incoming or outgoing cash parcels from or to Royal Bank. An armoured car company delivers the parcels on the dispatch date and delivers it to the appropriate location (branch or Royal Bank) on the delivery date.
Note:	At this time, only Class A clients in BC and ON can order precious metals.
14.2	Precious Metals Internal Controls Policy
YouГўВҖВҷre responsible for employing security practices and establishing internal controls for monitoring precious metals activity. Operations staff and external or internal auditors must establish internal controls for purchasing and buying back precious metals to prevent and detect errors in a timely manner.
Such policies can include but are not limited to the following:
Receiving and verifying precious metals parcels in joint custody
Maintaining the vault register in joint custody
Monitoring the inventory of precious metals to ensure that the number of physical items corresponds to the vault register
Reconciling precious metals daily (if applicable) to ensure shipments and/or deliveries are current
14.3	Precious Metals Purchases
In partnership with Royal Bank, Central 1 offers a diverse selection of precious metals products for purchase. Precious metals can only be purchased between 5:00 am PT ГўВҖВ“ 1:30 pm PT (8:00 am ET ГўВҖВ“ 4:30 pm ET), Monday to Friday. Orders canГўВҖВҷt be placed on American or Canadian statutory holidays. Central 1 must receive purchase instructions no later than 1:30 pm PT (4:30 pm ET).
All precious metal offerings are either Royal Canadian MintГўВ„Вў metals or current-year Maple Leaf bullion coins. The following products are available to purchase (subject to inventory and order size):
1 kilo (32.148oz) gold bars
1 oz gold bars
1 oz gold coins
100 oz silver bars
1 oz silver coins (a minimum purchase of 10 coins is required)
All precious metals products are subject to live market quotes. To initiate a purchase, email
treasury@central1.com
for a quote request. All orders are subject to a flat ordering fee
.
You can add an additional fee on top of any provided quotes from Central 1. There are no additional delivery charges to your financial institution.
To inquire about or to purchase precious metals on behalf of your customer, contact Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Treasury Team. Purchase requests must include the type(s) and quantities of the precious metals your customer wants to purchase. After receiving a quote from Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Treasury team, provide the quote to your customer. After receiving confirmation from your customer to proceed, reply to the email and instruct Central 1 to proceed with the order. Provide the following information in your reply:
Financial institution name
Branch address
Branch transit number
Central 1 confirms the purchase by email.
The precious metals purchase is delivered in your next cash parcel delivery from Royal Bank (subject to inventory and order size). If there are any questions or issues related to a precious metals purchase or shipment, contact Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Treasury team.
14.4	Verifying Incoming Precious Metals Parcels
The contents of precious metals orders must be verified in detail, in joint custody, within 24 hours of receipt. Verify the type(s) and the quantities of the precious metals.
14.5	Handling Discrepancies in Incoming Precious Metals Parcels
If an incoming precious metals order from Royal Bank doesnГўВҖВҷt correspond to the value or quantity ordered, immediately contact Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Treasury team.
Once Central 1 and Royal Bank investigate the claim, you will be provided with instructions and, if applicable, an adjustment. If an adjustment is needed, your Central 1 account is credited or debited when Royal Bank settles with Central 1.
14.6	Precious Metals Sell-backs
Customers can sell-back precious metals to you (if they were originally purchased from Central 1). Precious metals sell-back sales must occur between 5:00 am PT ГўВҖВ“ 1:30 pm PT (8:00 am ET ГўВҖВ“ 4:30 pm ET), Monday to Friday. Sell-back sales canГўВҖВҷt be placed on American or Canadian statutory holidays. Central 1 must receive confirmed sell-back sale instructions no later than 1:30 pm PT (4:30 pm ET).
Precious metals sell-back sales are subject to live market quotes and are subject to a flat fee. You may add an additional fee on top of any provided quotes from Central 1. There are no additional shipping charges to your financial institution.
Before any precious metals sell-back sales occur, email
treasury@central1.com
to request a quote. Quote requests must include the type(s) and quantities of the precious metals your customer is selling. After receiving a quote from Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Treasury team, provide the quote to your customer. After receiving confirmation from your customer to proceed, reply to the email and instruct Central 1 to proceed with the sell-back sale. Provide the following information in your reply:
Financial institution name
Branch address
Branch transit number
Central 1 confirms the sell-back sale by email.
After the sell-back sale is confirmed, prepare the precious metals for shipment to Royal Bank. Include the precious metals in the next cash parcel youГўВҖВҷre returning to Royal Bank. On an additional and separate deposit slip, indicate the type(s) and quantities of the precious metals and include the following information on it:
Financial institution name
Branch address
Branch transit number
Wrap the precious metals up in protective materials to ensure theyГўВҖВҷre intact when Royal Bank receives them. Attach the additional and separate deposit slip to the precious metals. Indicate on the cash parcelГўВҖВҷs bag that it includes a precious metals order and ensure the value of the precious metals matches the value of the armour carГўВҖВҷs manifest. The contents of the precious metals must be verified in detail, in joint custody, within 24 hours of shipment. If there are any questions or issues related to a precious metals sell-back sale or shipment, contact Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Treasury team.
14.7	Precious Metals Settlement
Precious metals are settled on the system advised dispatch date or on the date when Royal Bank receives the parcel. Any fees are debited to or from the branch receiving the precious metals order or from the branch responsible for arranging the precious metals order. Credits and debits are posted to your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs current account at Central 1. Precious metals deposit slips arenГўВҖВҷt returned to your financial institution as confirmation of receipt.
For settlement inquiries, contact Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Treasury Team.
END
